name: gh
description: Work seamlessly with GitHub from the command line

name: checkout
subcommands.description: Check out a pull request in git

name: list
subcommands.description: List pull requests in a repository

name: run
subcommands.description: List, view, and watch recent workflow runs from GitHub Actions

name: auth
subcommands.description: Authenticate gh and git with GitHub

name: browse
subcommands.description: Open the repository, issue, or pull request in the browser

name: status
subcommands.description: Print information about relevant issues, pull requests, and notifications
